- Vertikale Position Y
- Horizontale Position X" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=19;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="324" y="500" width="235" height="102" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xQzaD6n9kdEvcaNCd05s-116" value="Basis-Geschwindigkeit festlegen
basierend auf Y-Position" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=19;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="311" y="640" width="260" height="102" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xQzaD6n9kdEvcaNCd05s-117" value="Y-Position

Rechtes Rad: -X verringern" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=18;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="1395" width="251" height="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="xQzaD6n9kdEvcaNCd05s-123" value="Linkes Rad: -X verringern
